description: Fix existing issues in The Living Word KJV Bible app: light mode text readability on home page, add Wikipedia images and references throughout, fix overlapping/alignment issues, and ensure production readiness

epics.title: Light Mode Text Readability & Theme Fixes

stories.title: Fix hero section overlay for light/sepia themes
stories.description: The HeroSection uses hardcoded dark overlay colors (from-[#0F0F1A]/80 via-[#0F0F1A]/70 to-[#0F0F1A]/95) that make text hard to read in light mode because the overlay stays dark but text colors change to dark text-primary. Fix by: (1) Making the overlay use CSS variables so it adapts per theme — in light mode use a lighter semi-transparent overlay with dark text that's readable, (2) Ensure the hero h1, subtitle, verse text, verse ref, and CTA button all have sufficient contrast in all 3 themes, (3) The 'King James Version' label, scroll indicator, and 'Begin Reading' button should also be visible. Files to modify: components/landing/HeroSection.tsx, app/globals.css. Acceptance criteria: All hero text is readable with WCAG AA contrast in dark, light, and sepia themes.

stories.title: Fix light mode contrast across all landing sections
stories.description: Review and fix text contrast issues across BooksGrid, ArtworkOfDay, MapPreview, EvidenceSpotlight, TimelinePreview, and SearchSection in light mode. Key issues: (1) MapPreview has hardcoded dark background (from-[#1a1f2e] via-[#1e2438] to-[#151927]) — needs theme-aware background, (2) Map pin labels have bg-[var(--bg-primary)]/80 which may not contrast well, (3) Section headings using text-gold class may not have enough contrast on light backgrounds, (4) Check all text-[var(--text-muted)] and text-[var(--text-secondary)] elements for sufficient contrast. Files to modify: components/landing/MapPreview.tsx, components/landing/BooksGrid.tsx, components/landing/TimelinePreview.tsx, components/landing/SearchSection.tsx, components/landing/EvidenceSpotlight.tsx, app/globals.css (if CSS variable adjustments needed). Acceptance criteria: All landing page sections readable in all 3 themes.

stories.title: Add Wikipedia images to people profiles and cards
stories.description: People pages currently show only a Crown icon placeholder. Add Wikipedia/Wikimedia Commons images for biblical figures. (1) Add a wikipediaImageUrl field to the people data/seed, (2) Create a helper that builds Wikimedia Commons thumbnail URLs for known biblical figures, (3) Update PersonCard component to show Wikipedia image instead of just Crown icon, (4) Update the person profile page (app/people/[slug]/page.tsx) header to show a Wikipedia portrait image alongside the Crown icon, (5) Add proper attribution text 'Image: Wikimedia Commons' below images, (6) Handle image load errors gracefully with fallback to the Crown icon. Create a data mapping file at lib/data/people-images.ts with Wikimedia Commons URLs for major biblical figures (at minimum: Abraham, Moses, David, Solomon, Jesus, Paul, Peter, Mary, Adam, Eve, Noah, Jacob, Joseph, Isaiah, Daniel, Elijah, Ruth, Esther, Samson, Joshua). Files to modify: components/people/PersonCard.tsx, app/people/[slug]/page.tsx, lib/data/people-images.ts (new). Acceptance criteria: People pages show relevant Wikipedia artwork images with attribution.

stories.title: Enhance evidence pages with additional Wikipedia images and source references
stories.description: Evidence pages already have some Wikimedia images but need: (1) Add more Wikipedia reference links — add a 'Learn More' section to evidence detail pages with links to relevant Wikipedia articles (e.g., Dead Sea Scrolls → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dead_Sea_Scrolls), (2) Create a data mapping at lib/data/evidence-references.ts mapping evidence slugs to Wikipedia article URLs, (3) Update the evidence detail page sidebar to include a 'Further Reading' card with Wikipedia links, (4) Add additional gallery images from Wikimedia Commons for each evidence item where available (multiple angles/views), (5) Ensure all images have proper Wikimedia attribution. Files to modify: app/evidence/[slug]/page.tsx, lib/data/evidence-references.ts (new), components/evidence/EvidenceCard.tsx. Acceptance criteria: Evidence detail pages show Wikipedia reference links and additional images.

stories.title: Add rotating artwork with Wikipedia images on landing page
stories.description: Currently ArtworkOfDay only shows one hardcoded painting (Creation of Adam). Add a rotation of famous biblical artworks from Wikimedia Commons. (1) Create lib/data/artwork-gallery.ts with 10-15 famous biblical paintings from Wikimedia Commons (include: Creation of Adam, The Last Supper - Da Vinci, Moses with the Tablets - Rembrandt, David and Goliath - Caravaggio, The Annunciation - Fra Angelico, The Baptism of Christ - Verrocchio, Daniel in the Lions Den - Rubens, The Good Samaritan - Rembrandt, The Prodigal Son - Rembrandt, Judith Slaying Holofernes - Artemisia). Each entry should have: title, artist, yearCreated, imageUrl (Wikimedia Commons), description, attribution, and a wikipediaUrl, (2) Update ArtworkOfDay to rotate daily from this gallery, (3) Add the Wikipedia article link to the artwork card. Files to modify: components/landing/ArtworkOfDay.tsx, lib/data/artwork-gallery.ts (new). Acceptance criteria: Landing page shows a different artwork each day with proper attribution and Wikipedia link.

stories.title: Fix header overlapping hero section and mobile nav alignment
stories.description: The header is sticky (top-0 z-40) and the hero section is h-[100dvh] — the hero content may be hidden behind the header (64px tall). Also MobileNav hamburger may not align with other header items. Fixes: (1) Add pt-16 or adjust hero height to account for the sticky header (min-h-[calc(100dvh-4rem)]) so content isn't hidden, (2) Ensure the scroll indicator at the bottom of hero doesn't overlap with the BooksGrid section below, (3) Verify mobile nav hamburger button alignment with theme toggle and search, (4) On the chapter reading page, verify the ReadingProgress bar (sticky top-0) doesn't conflict with the header (also sticky top-0 z-40) — ReadingProgress should be top-16 or stacked below header. Files to modify: components/landing/HeroSection.tsx, components/layout/Header.tsx, components/scripture/ReadingProgress.tsx, components/layout/MobileNav.tsx. Acceptance criteria: No content hidden behind header, progress bar visible below header, mobile nav aligned.

stories.title: Fix map preview pin overlaps and mobile layout issues
stories.description: On the landing page MapPreview, the map pins are positioned by lat/lng percentages and can overlap each other, especially on mobile. Also the 'Explore Biblical World' CTA button at the bottom may overlap with pins. Fixes: (1) Increase minimum spacing between pins — adjust the percentage calculation or hide some pins on mobile (show only 4-5 key locations on small screens), (2) Move the CTA button outside the map area or add a gradient overlay at the bottom to separate it from pins, (3) Ensure the Stats bar (100+ Locations, 5+ Journeys, 12+ Regions) text doesn't get cut off on narrow screens, (4) On the actual /maps page, verify Leaflet map controls don't overlap with location filter buttons. Files to modify: components/landing/MapPreview.tsx, components/maps/MapFilters.tsx. Acceptance criteria: Map pins don't overlap, CTA is clearly separated, stats bar readable on mobile.

stories.title: Fix context panel and footer alignment on chapter pages
stories.description: On chapter reading pages, the mobile context panel floating button (fixed bottom-6 right-4 z-40) may overlap with the footer or the chapter navigation buttons. Also the desktop context panel width transition may cause content to jump. Fixes: (1) Add bottom padding to chapter page content to account for the floating context button on mobile, (2) Ensure the floating button doesn't overlap ChapterNavigation prev/next buttons, (3) On desktop, when context panel collapses from w-80/w-96 to w-12, ensure scripture text reflows smoothly without layout shift, (4) Fix the mobile bottom sheet — ensure it doesn't extend behind the device notch/home indicator (pb-safe is there but verify), (5) On the books grid page (app/bible/[bookSlug]/page.tsx), verify the chapter grid cards don't overlap or misalign on tablet breakpoints. Files to modify: components/scripture/ContextPanel.tsx, app/bible/[bookSlug]/[chapter]/page.tsx, components/scripture/ChapterNavigation.tsx. Acceptance criteria: No overlapping elements on chapter pages at any viewport size.

stories.title: Fix timeline and evidence carousel scroll alignment
stories.description: The timeline preview and evidence spotlight use horizontal scroll carousels that may have alignment issues: (1) Timeline cards may overflow their containers on very small screens (< 360px), (2) Evidence carousel snap-x snap-mandatory may not work consistently across browsers, (3) The horizontal timeline line (absolute top-[38px]) may not align with the dots when font size changes, (4) Carousel scroll buttons hidden on mobile — add touch scroll hint or swipe indicators, (5) Evidence cards with long significance text may have inconsistent card heights due to line-clamp-3. Fixes: ensure consistent card heights, proper snap behavior, responsive dot alignment, and add a visual swipe indicator on mobile. Files to modify: components/landing/TimelinePreview.tsx, components/landing/EvidenceSpotlight.tsx. Acceptance criteria: Carousels scroll smoothly, cards have consistent heights, timeline dots align with line.

stories.title: Add image error handling and loading states
stories.description: External Wikimedia images may fail to load. Add robust error handling: (1) Create a reusable components/shared/SafeImage.tsx wrapper around next/image that shows a styled placeholder on error (use a themed gradient with an icon instead of broken image), (2) Add loading='lazy' and proper sizes attributes to all Image components that don't have them, (3) Add blur placeholder or skeleton loading states for large images (artwork, evidence photos), (4) Update next.config.mjs to ensure all Wikimedia Commons subdomains are in the images.remotePatterns config, (5) Replace all instances of unoptimized={true} prop on Image components — these bypass Next.js image optimization. Files to modify: components/shared/SafeImage.tsx (new), next.config.mjs, components/landing/ArtworkOfDay.tsx, components/landing/EvidenceSpotlight.tsx, components/evidence/EvidenceCard.tsx, app/evidence/[slug]/page.tsx. Acceptance criteria: No broken image placeholders visible, images load with skeleton states.

stories.title: Fix all build errors, lint warnings, and run production build
stories.description: Run the full production pipeline to ensure everything compiles: (1) Run 'npm run lint' and fix all ESLint errors/warnings, (2) Run 'npx tsc --noEmit' and fix all TypeScript errors, (3) Run 'npm run build' and fix any Next.js build errors (especially generateStaticParams issues, missing data, or SSR-incompatible code), (4) Check for any hydration mismatches (client/server rendering differences) — especially in components that use useMediaQuery, localStorage, or Date.now(), (5) Verify the database file exists and seed script works, (6) Test that all pages render without crashing. Fix all issues found. Files to modify: any files with errors. Acceptance criteria: 'npm run build' completes successfully with zero errors.
